novel_features.name: Env-var diff across services and env-groups
novel_features.description: Compare env vars between any two services, env-groups, or a service vs an env-group, three-way diff style.

novel_features.name: Env-var promotion with allow/deny lists
novel_features.description: Copy env vars from a source service or env-group to a target with --only/--exclude/--dry-run.

novel_features.name: Blueprint drift detection
novel_features.description: Compare a checked-in render.yaml against live workspace state and report added/removed/modified entities by name.

novel_features.name: Cost rollup across services and datastores
novel_features.description: Sum monthly cost across services, postgres, key-value, redis, and disks; group by project, environment, or owner.

novel_features.name: Stale preview environment cleanup
novel_features.description: List preview services older than --stale-days N; delete in bulk on --confirm.

novel_features.name: Orphan resource sweep
novel_features.description: Find unattached disks, empty env-groups, custom-domains pointing at deleted services, registry credentials referenced by no service, and disk snapshots beyond retention.

novel_features.name: Cross-resource env-var locator
novel_features.description: For a given env-var key, list every service and env-group that defines it with hash, length, and last-modified timestamp (never raw value).

novel_features.name: Incident timeline merge
novel_features.description: Merge deploys, events, and audit-logs for one service into one chronological table for a given window.

novel_features.name: Audit-log forensic search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across cached audit logs by actor, target, action, and time window.

novel_features.name: Deploy-to-deploy diff
novel_features.description: Show commit range, env-var changes, image-tag changes, and plan/region/scale changes between two deploys of one service.

novel_features.name: Rightsizing recommendations from metrics
novel_features.description: For each service, fetch last --since 7d of CPU and memory; compute p95 utilization; flag services breaching --high or --low thresholds against plan capacity.
